description_long: This object depicts an adult pedestrian with outstretched arms, forming a T-pose commonly used for digital modeling. The figure is dressed in fitted pants and a long-sleeve top, with visible details such as seams and folds in the clothing. The footwear appears sturdy and extends above the ankles, resembling boots. The head is proportionate, with facial features visible from the front and back views. The hands are relaxed and fingers are extended, with no objects being held. The overall build is average, and the posture is upright and symmetrical.
description: An adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing fitted clothing and boots, with arms extended horizontally and a neutral upright posture.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full arm span and the back of the head and body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, torso, and the thickness of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the full arm span and the front of the face and body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, torso, and limbs from the other side.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve top and fitted pants with sturdy boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
